message:
fix(wizard): clarify SSH tunnel step to specify where to run codex login

The SSH tunnel instruction said "Then run:" which was ambiguous.
Changed to "In that SSH session (on VPS):" to make it clear that
codex login should be run in the SSH session that was just opened.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -257,7 +257,7 @@ export default function StatusCheckPage() {

Option 2: SSH Tunnel

  1. On your laptop: ssh -L 1455:localhost:1455 ubuntu@YOUR_VPS_IP
    2. -
  2. Then run: codex login
    3. +
  3. In that SSH session (on VPS): codex login
  4. The OAuth redirect will reach your VPS through the tunnel
